title: Mahadev Temple, Tambdi Surla
tagline: Mahadev Temple, Tambdi Surla — spiritual town of Goa

overview.short: Mahadeva Temple, Tambdi Surla is a 13th-century Hindu temple in the Kadamba style dedicated to Lord Shiva, one of the main deities in Hinduism, and is an active place of Hindu wors
overview.description: Mahadeva Temple, Tambdi Surla is a 13th-century Hindu temple in the Kadamba style dedicated to Lord Shiva, one of the main deities in Hinduism, and is an active place of Hindu worship. It is an ASI protected Monument of National Importance in Goa. The temple is dedicated to Lord Shiva and is reminiscent of the temples at Aihole in neighbouring Karnataka.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Anmod
topPlaces.description: Anmod (officially recorded as Anamod) is a village in the Supa (Joida) taluk of Uttara Kannada district in the Indian state of Karnataka. Situated directly on the border between Goa and Karnataka, it serves as a primary transit point along the Belgaum-Goa route via the Anmod Ghat.

topPlaces.name: Mollem, Goa
topPlaces.description: Mollem (pronounced mole; the alphabet m is silent) is a small village in Goa,on NH4 near the border with Karnataka in the foothills of the Sahyadri Mountain range at the beginning of Anmod Ghat. It comes under the Dharbandora block.

topPlaces.name: Bhagwan Mahaveer Sanctuary and Mollem National Park
topPlaces.description: Bhagwan Mahaveer Sanctuary and Mollem National Park is a 240 square kilometres (93 sq mi) protected area located in the Western Ghats of West India, in Dharbandora taluk, Goa State, along the eastern border with Karnataka. The area is situated near the town of Molem, 57 kilometres (35 mi) east of Panaji, the state capital of Goa.

image.alt: Bhagwan Mahaveer Sanctuary and Mollem National Park

topPlaces.name: Akheti
topPlaces.description: Akheti is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Supa taluk of Uttara Kannada district in Karnataka.

topPlaces.name: Braganza Ghats
topPlaces.description: Braganza Ghats are a stretch of hill section in the Western Ghats alias Sahyadri Range at the Karnataka – Goa border. This 26 km ghat section rail road connects coastal Goa to the hinterlands of Karnataka and other parts.

topPlaces.name: Castle Rock, Karnataka
topPlaces.description: Castle Rock is a village in the Uttara Kannada district of the Indian state of Karnataka. The village is located in the Western Ghats on the state's border with Goa - at an elevation of 621 m (2,040 ft).

topPlaces.name: Sonsogor
topPlaces.description: Sonsogor, or Sonsogod, is the highest peak in the state of Goa, India, at an elevation of 1,026 metres (3,366 feet) above sea level. It is located at the trijunction of Sattari taluka, North Goa district and Khanapur taluka, Belagavi district, and Joida taluka, Uttara Kannada district, Karnataka state, It is a part of the Western Ghats mountain range in Goa's Mhadei Wildlife Sanctuary.

items.note: Anmod (officially recorded as Anamod) is a village in the Supa (Joida) taluk of Uttara Kannada district in the Indian state of Karnataka. Situated directly on the border between Goa and Karnataka, it serves as a primary transit point along the Belgaum-Goa route via the Anmod Ghat.

Mollem (pronounced mole; the alphabet m is silent) is a small village in Goa,on NH4 near the border with Karnataka in the foothills of the Sahyadri Mountain range at the beginning of Anmod Ghat. It comes under the Dharbandora block.

The area is situated near the town of Molem, 57 kilometres (35 mi) east of Panaji, the state capital of Goa.

Braganza Ghats are a stretch of hill section in the Western Ghats alias Sahyadri Range at the Karnataka – Goa border. This 26 km ghat section rail road connects coastal Goa to the hinterlands of Karnataka and other parts.

Sonsogor, or Sonsogod, is the highest peak in the state of Goa, India, at an elevation of 1,026 metres (3,366 feet) above sea level. It is located at the trijunction of Sattari taluka, North Goa district and Khanapur taluka, Belagavi district, and Joida taluka, Uttara Kannada district, Karnataka state, It is a part of the Western Ghats mountain range in Goa's Mhadei Wildlife Sanctuary.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Mahadev Temple, Tambdi Surla?
faq.a: The best time to visit Mahadev Temple, Tambdi Surla is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Mahadev Temple, Tambdi Surla?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Goa International Airport, Dabolim (46 km) and the nearest railway station is Madgaon Junction (Goa) (37 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Mahadev Temple, Tambdi Surla?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Mahadev Temple, Tambdi Surla at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Mahadev Temple, Tambdi Surla?
faq.a: Stays in Mahadev Temple, Tambdi Surla start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Mahadev Temple, Tambdi Surla?
faq.a: The top attractions are Anmod, Mollem, Goa, Bhagwan Mahaveer Sanctuary and Mollem National Park, Akheti, Braganza Ghats.
